panels.title: DMC Proxy CPU Usage on node
DMC Proxy Mem Usage on node
DMC Proxy Workers Thread CPU Utilization

panels.description: display the ingress/egress traffic on the node's NIC
panels.title: Ingress/Egress Traffic

targets.expr: avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node) / avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node)

topk(10, sum(rate(endpoint_read_requests{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_write_requests{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests{cluster="$cluster", node="$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (db, proxy))
